subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! My tears have flowed copiously, my sighs have grown lengthy, and my pangs of longing have intensified, all out of yearning to meet Thee and be drawn unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد سالت عبراتی و طالت زفراتی و اشتدت حسراتی شوقا للقائک و انجذابا
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @soul; spirit after death, @prayer for nearness to God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @presence of; reunion with God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
